mapper.select: select id, name, category, location, capacity, cover_url, description, longitude, latitude, status from venue where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select id, slot_date, start_time, end_time, max_capacity, available_capacity, status from venue_slot where venue_id = #{venueId} and slot_date = #{slotDate} order by start_time asc
select id, name, category, location, capacity, cover_url, description, longitude, latitude, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time from venue where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into venue ( name, category, location, capacity, cover_url, description, longitude, latitude, status, is_deleted ) values ( #{name}, #{category}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{coverUrl}, #{description}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{status}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: update venue set name = #{name}, category = #{category}, location = #{location}, capacity = #{capacity}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, description = #{description}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update venue set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{venueId} and is_deleted = 0
